svg.text: Browser SDP offer → /api/ai/realtime/session → OpenAI /v1/realtime/calls → SDP answer
Microphone → RTCPeerConnection ↔ OpenAI Realtime → Speaker (bypasses Vercel entirely)
GET /api/matches reads structured_profiles · scores compatibility · returns curated matches
15-minute session limit · Sage closes gracefully · profile extracted on end
User can say goodbye to end early · all transcript writes awaited before extraction
Done Swiping · voice-first dating app · June 2026 · github.com/AIMarketingMonkey/done-swiping
